prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UEGAWRSK-12PC-4 Product Type: WATCH Brand (from catalog): Sona Existing Title: 250pc Eyeglass & Watch Pipe Screw Repair Kit Description: There is no universal screw for your watch or eyeglasses. The good news is that this Eyeglass and Watch Screw Repair Kit contains many various tiny screws that will most likely contain the one you need to repair your watch or glasses.

This watch & eyeglass repair tool kit is perfect for replacing lost screws and parts of all sizes. Search Terms: watch repair kit eyeglass screw casio quartz Features: - 250 Assorted Mini Screws - Hard Plastic Swivel Container === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Sona 250pc Watch and Eyeglass Screw Repair Kit

tokens.name: Watch and Eyeglass Screw Repair Kit

openai.item_name: Sona 250-pk Eyeglass and Watch Screw Repair Kit

tokens.name: Eyeglass and Watch Screw Repair Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 250 Assorted Mini Screws, Hard Plastic Swivel Container, Watch Repair, Eyeglass Repair, Multiple Sizes

openai.title_differentiation: 250 Assorted Mini Screws, Hard Plastic Swivel Container, For Watch And Eyeglass Repairs, Easy To Organize
